[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00100000 1

01 10 00001000 1
12 21 10000100 2
23 32 10000100 2
34 43 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
45 54 00000001 1
56 65 00011011 4
67 76 00010111 4
70 07 00000001 1

02 20 00100000 1 match 7
13 31 10000100 2
24 42 01000000 1
35 53 00000010 1
46 64 01000001 2
57 75 00010011 3
60 06 00001001 2
71 17 10010100 3

03 30 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
14 41 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
25 52 00100000 1 match 7
36 63 00000110 2
47 74 00000001 1
50 05 00101001 3
61 16 00011100 3
72 27 10000100 2

04 40 00000001 1
15 51 00011000 2
26 62 01000100 2
37 73 10000110 3
